checks: all h1-h17 and f1-f18 are present exactly once
volume and clearance dimensions are explicit
propofol and remifentanil amount scales cannot be interchanged
LBM h18/f18 and f12 conflicts are selectable only through an approved versioned configuration
zero infusion from zero state remains zero
nonnegative state invariance for nonnegative infusion
mass-balance residual is within numeric tolerance
zero-input decay is monotone in total drug amount
constant-input steady-state behavior matches an independent analytical calculation
exact zero-order-hold and a high-accuracy independent ODE solution agree
effect-site concentration lags an input transient
constant Cp converges to Ce=Cp
BIS is 98 at zero concentrations before optional noise
deterministic BIS is monotone nonincreasing in each nonnegative Ce
BIS remains finite over an approved synthetic demographic/action grid
agent-specific and combined concentration response calculations match hand-worked reference cases
Minto f12 0.030 versus 0.0301 trajectory difference
approved integration-step sensitivity
approved noise/no-noise variants
approved initialization variants
all results labeled by configuration without selecting a winner from outcomes
reset and step satisfy the locked Gymnasium API
one action is held for exactly the approved interval
transition order and reward next-state timing are invariant
remifentanil remains exogenous
P0/P1 share latent trajectory disturbances and drug histories
S1 is a strict state superset of S0
no future timestamp enters an observation
terminated and truncated semantics are tested separately
library PPO is not reimplemented when Stable-Baselines3 is selected
action transformation is bijective inside bounds and saturation is logged
observation space contains generated observations
fixed-seed bounded synthetic rollout is reproducible within the declared tolerance
no full training occurs during integration validation

acceptance_rule: Every applicable deterministic check passes; sensitivity outputs remain descriptive; unresolved constants remain blocked.
